# AVGO Panel — 2026-07-02 — SKIP the dip; cancel the price-only add plan

*Educational analysis, not financial advice. Single names are satellites; the index is the bar.*

## TOP RECAP

**Do not add AVGO at $358, and cancel the standing "add toward 8–10 shares at $350–360" plan** — the price is in the zone, but the zone is being sold into by insiders ($620M sold vs $1.9M bought in 12 months, including the co-founder's June cluster), sentiment shows zero capitulation despite the −27.5% drawdown, and the whole cheap-PEG/moat case rests on the same unverified "$100B FY27" guidance figure that Google's TPUv9 defection to MediaTek just cracked. Keep the 4-share IBKR stub (immaterial) and re-open the add case only on falsifiable evidence: an insider open-market buy cluster, or a confirmed close above $365 with clean Form 4s — both now registered as alerts.

**Market narrative:** the global AI selloff extended today after a dismal June payrolls print — Dow up, Nasdaq/S&P down on tech weakness, gold up, dollar weaker; Burry's chip-ETF puts (AVGO is a top-3 SOXX component) named the tape.

This panel is a hypothesis — the ">365 confirm" rule must clear strategy-discovery-backtest (full costs, walk-forward) before risking capital. yfinance fundamentals are point-in-time unsafe (fine for current entry analysis, never for backtests).
